name: lymals-vscode
description: VS Code language support for Lyma via the lymals language server.

lymalsExtension.server.path.markdownDescription: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the lymals server executable. User/global values are used automatically; workspace values require a trusted workspace and an approval prompt. Leave empty to fall back to LYMALS_SERVER_PATH, the local debug build, or PATH.

lymalsExtension.server.args.markdownDescription: Additional command-line arguments passed before the extension-appended `--stdio` transport flag.

lymalsExtension.server.allowUntitled.markdownDescription: Also start lymals for untitled Lyma buffers. Disabled by default so the language client only manages file-backed documents.

lymalsExtension.server.logFile.markdownDescription: Optional log file path passed to lymals as `--log-file`. Relative values resolve from the workspace folder when available. Changes apply after the language server restarts. In extension development, leaving this empty defaults to a storage-backed log file so server logging never competes with stdio.

lymalsExtension.server.rustLog.markdownDescription: Optional `RUST_LOG` value injected into the lymals server process environment. Changes apply after the language server restarts.

lymalsExtension.server.trace.server.markdownDescription: Language client protocol tracing level for traffic to and from lymals. Traces are written to Output > Lymals and updated with the client trace controls supported by `vscode-languageclient`/LSP trace notifications.

lymalsExtension.server.build.command.markdownDescription: Optional executable used to build lymals before activation. Runs shell-free and only when build-on-activation is enabled in a trusted workspace.

lymalsExtension.server.build.args.markdownDescription: Arguments for the optional shell-free lymals build command.

lymalsExtension.server.build.cwd.markdownDescription: Optional working directory for the lymals build command. Relative values resolve from the workspace folder.

lymalsExtension.server.buildOnActivation.markdownDescription: When enabled, runs the optional shell-free lymals build command before giving up on auto-resolution. Trusted workspaces only.

lymalsExtension.trace.client.markdownDescription: Extension/client output logging verbosity for Output > Lymals. Changes take effect immediately.

lymals.diagnostics.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable parser, validation, and resolver diagnostics from lymals. Default: `true`.

lymals.formatting.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable document formatting support from lymals. Default: `true`.

lymals.imports.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable import/include resolution features in lymals. Default: `true`.

lymals.semanticTokens.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable semantic token classification from lymals. Default: `true`.

lymals.completion.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable completion support from lymals. Default: `true`.

lymals.inlayHints.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable inlay hints from lymals. Default: `true`.

lymals.inlayHints.inferredTypes.markdownDescription: Show inferred type inlay hints. Default: `false`.

lymals.inlayHints.importResolution.markdownDescription: Show import resolution inlay hints. Default: `false`.

lymals.evaluation.enabled.markdownDescription: Reserved future-evaluation flag. In v1, lymals remains parse-only. Untrusted workspaces cannot broaden this beyond the safe default. Default: `false`.

lymals.logLevel.markdownDescription: Server-side logging verbosity used by lymals. Default: `"info"`.

lymals.parserBackend.markdownDescription: Parser backend selection for lymals. Default: `"auto"`.

lymals.indexWorkspace.markdownDescription: Index workspace files for cross-file features. Default: `true`.

lymals.followImportsInIndex.markdownDescription: Follow import/include edges during workspace indexing. Default: `true`.

lymals.allowedRoots.markdownDescription: Additional root URIs permitted for import/include resolution. Untrusted workspaces are forced back to the safe default. Default: `[]`.

lymals.allowedSchemes.markdownDescription: Allowed URI schemes for import/include resolution. Safe default: `["file"]`; untrusted workspaces cannot broaden it.

lymals.allowAbsoluteFileUris.markdownDescription: Allow absolute `file:` URIs outside root-bounded resolution. Untrusted workspaces are forced back to the safe default. Default: `false`.

lymals.excludeGlobs.markdownDescription: Glob patterns excluded from indexing and related workspace scans. Default: `[]`.

lymals.maxResolveDepth.markdownDescription: Maximum recursive import/include resolution depth. Default: `16`.

lymals.maxResolvedEdgesPerFile.markdownDescription: Maximum resolved import/include edges per file. Default: `256`.

lymals.maxIndexedFilesPerWorkspace.markdownDescription: Maximum files indexed per workspace. Default: `10000`.

lymals.maxIndexedFileBytes.markdownDescription: Maximum file size, in bytes, that lymals indexes. Default: `1048576`.
